title: Most Hunted Ship Types
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM Bounty WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT COALESCE(Target, 'Unknown') AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM Bounty WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY Target ORDER BY value DESC

details.text: {count} bounty kill(s) recorded during the report period.
details.help: Target on Bounty is the ship type destroyed. Top 5 shown; remainder rolled into Other.

tagLines: Target vessel classification data archived. Ship type frequency analysis complete.
Sidewinders, Cobras, Anacondas — the chart doesn't judge. It just counts.
The ships you've destroyed most are the ones that kept crossing your path. Or your gunsights.
